debug_info.goal:
case succ.cons
α : Type u_1
elt : α
idx' : ℕ
HR :
  ∀ {l : List (List α)} {l1 : List α} {hidx : idx' < l.length},
    (l.set idx' (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
      (l.set idx' l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take idx' (List.map List.length l)).sum + l1.length) elt
l1 hd : List α
tl : List (List α)
HR2 :
  ∀ {hidx : idx' + 1 < tl.length},
    (tl.set (idx' + 1) (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
      (tl.set (idx' + 1) l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take (idx' + 1) (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length) elt
hidx : idx' + 1 < (hd :: tl).length
⊢ hd ++ (tl.set idx' (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
    (hd ++ (tl.set idx' l1).flatten).insertIdx (hd.length + (List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length)
      elt

failed_attempts:
simp at hidx
          rw [@HR tl l1 hidx]
          rw [list_insertIdx_length (l1 := hd) (l2 := (tl.set idx' l1).flatten) 
              (idx := hd.length + (List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length)
              (hidx := by omega)]
          simp [List.insertIdx_length_self]
          congr 1
          omega

simp only [List.set_succ_cons, List.flatten_cons, List.map_cons, List.length_cons,
            List.take_succ_cons, List.sum_cons]
          rw [@HR tl l1 hidx]
          rw [list_insertIdx_length (l1 := hd) (hidx := by omega)]
          congr 1
          omega

              (hidx := by omega)]
          simp [List.insertIdx_length_self]

          rw [@HR tl l1 hidx]
          rw [List.insertIdx_append_right]
          · congr 1
            omega
          · exact Nat.le_add_right _ _

          rw [h]
          symm
          rw [← list_insertIdx_length (l1 := hd) (hidx := Nat.le_refl _)]
          simp [List.insertIdx_length_self]
